testcase.name: [BeforeSuite]

testcase.name: [It] ClusterMaster Controller ClusterMaster Management failed Get ClusterMaster custom resource should fail
testcase.failure: [FAILED] Expected <string>: "no kin..." to equal | <string>: "cluste..." In [It] at: /Users/mploski/splunk/splunk-operator/internal/controller/clustermaster_controller_test.go:46 @ 01/29/26 16:30:32.32
